text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And the sun has fallen at Nakayama Racecourse!
Who will take home the glory at the end of this
year?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide's been doing so awesome lately.
I'm definitely going with her!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
No way! It's all about Machitan! She's totally
gonna win! Trust me!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Oh, really? So you're a Tannhauser fan?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yup! I'm not that fast... but that's exactly why I
like Machitan!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: You like her because... you aren't fast?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I get what you're trying to say. It's like she
represents all of us normal people.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
That makes her really easy to relate to, and it's
encouraging to watch her. I honestly think she's
amazing.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Ahhh, I think I get it...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Plus, it's kind of cute how clumsy she is. The other
day she got so excited she couldn't even run.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
She almost swallowed a spider that got into her
teacup this morning as well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Thank goodness her trainer stopped her...

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Haha, really? She really is so cute—wait! Aren't
you Ikuno and Turbo?!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Gooo, Machitaaan! Gooo, Natuuure!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hayahide! I've heard a lot about you.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But! That doesn't matter! I'll be the one taking
home the win today!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. They're calling this your comeback
race—that you've come back stronger than ever.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, I'm not planning on giving up this win to
anyone. So let's have a clean race.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: ...Right!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two exchange a firm handshake and start to
head off to the turf, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: HOLD IT RIGHT THERE!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I'M HERE TOO, YOU KNOW!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah. You're pretty much yelling.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I've decided something today. Today... I'm
walking straight down the center. I'm gonna win...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: And I'm gonna be the star of the show!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser has always made sure to stay
out of the way of the other Umamusume in the
runners' tunnel. According to her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You know how rivals shake hands at the climax of
a movie?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That's not a moment for an ordinary gal like me
to barge in on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, she's declaring that she's going to make
herself known. In other words, that shows exactly
how much—

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I mean it!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I got it! You know, I've heard a lot about
you too. Don't think I don't have my eye on you!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I came here to win today. I'm not letting anyone
else be the star of the show. So... bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I will!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I feel the same. I've already looked into all of
your data.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
If the winner of today's race is the "star," then I
have no intention of letting anyone else have the
title.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: You're on!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
That goes for you over there too, Nature! I'm not
losing to anyone!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What?! I mean, uhhh, me too! I'm gonna win!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The four of them exchange glances and exit the
runners' tunnel.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...Until Matikanetannhauser comes back for some
reason.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, I forgot something! There's something I
want to do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Um, will you do a cheer with me? Since today's a
special day and all.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Heehee. Okay, here we go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Go, go, Arima Kinen! Ei, ei...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: All right! Here I go!
